languages.text: {n}Старик сотрясается всем телом, после чего резко замирает. Судорожно всхлипывая, он шепчет с глупой улыбкой.{/n} "Услышу... Его! Не кара... Испытание! Претерплю муки... плоти... Дух найдет путь..."

{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."
languages.original_text: {n}Старик сотрясается всем телом, после чего резко замирает. Судорожно всхлипывая, он шепчет с глупой улыбкой.{/n} "Услышу... Его! Не кара... Испытание! Претерплю муки... плоти... Дух найдет путь..."

traits.locale_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."
"Will I... hear Him? This f-foreign body... not a punishment... A test! I will endure... the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

languages.text: 「そして、私はまた彼に会えるのか？ この異物、それは罰ではなく試練だ。肉体の苦痛を耐えれば、魂は道を見つけるだろう。道？ 彼らも見るべきだ。私は… 私は…」
languages.original_text: "And will I hear Him again? So this foreign body is not a punishment, but a test. I will endure the torments of the flesh, if my spirit can find a way.... A way? For they, too, must see it. I... must..."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、私はまた彼に会えるのか？ この異物、それは罰ではなく試練だ。肉体の苦痛を耐えれば、魂は道を見つけるだろう。道？ 彼らも見るべきだ。私は… 私は…」

languages.text: {n}他全身颤抖了一下，然后猛地僵住。他一边抽泣，一边带着痴傻的笑容低声说：{/n}“我会听见……祂的声音！这不是惩罚……是考验！我会承受……肉体的折磨……我的灵魂会找到出路……”
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

traits.locale_text: {n}他全身颤抖了一下，然后猛地僵住。他一边抽泣，一边带着痴傻的笑容低声说：{/n}“我会听见……祂的声音！这不是惩罚……是考验！我会承受……肉体的折磨……我的灵魂会找到出路……”

languages.text: {n}Il est pris de frissons, puis se fige soudain. Sanglotant, il murmure, un sourire sans joie sur les lèvres :{/n} « Je L'écouterai... Lui ! Pas une punition... Une mise à l'épreuve ! J'endurerai les tourments... de la chair... Mon esprit trouvera une solution... »
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il est pris de frissons, puis se fige soudain. Sanglotant, il murmure, un sourire sans joie sur les lèvres :{/n} « Je L'écouterai... Lui ! Pas une punition... Une mise à l'épreuve ! J'endurerai les tourments... de la chair... Mon esprit trouvera une solution... »

languages.text: {n}Su cuerpo se estremece, después queda inmóvil repentinamente. Sollozando, susurra con una sonrisa embobada:{/n} «¡Escucharé... Su voz! No es un castigo... ¡una prueba! Soportaré el tormento de... la carne... Mi espíritu encontrará la forma...».
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Su cuerpo se estremece, después queda inmóvil repentinamente. Sollozando, susurra con una sonrisa embobada:{/n} «¡Escucharé... Su voz! No es un castigo... ¡una prueba! Soportaré el tormento de... la carne... Mi espíritu encontrará la forma...».

languages.text: {n}Bütün vücudu ürperiyor, ardından aniden donakalıyor. Hıçkırarak, aptalca bir gülümsemeyle fısıldıyor.{/n} "O'nu... Duyacağım! Bu bir ceza değil... Bir sınav! Etin... Istıraplarına dayanacağım... Ruhum bir yolunu bulacak..."
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bütün vücudu ürperiyor, ardından aniden donakalıyor. Hıçkırarak, aptalca bir gülümsemeyle fısıldıyor.{/n} "O'nu... Duyacağım! Bu bir ceza değil... Bir sınav! Etin... Istıraplarına dayanacağım... Ruhum bir yolunu bulacak..."

languages.text: {n}Sein ganzer Körper erzittert, ehe er plötzlich erstarrt. Schluchzend flüstert er mit einem freudlosen Lächeln:{/n} "Ich höre ... Ihn! Keine Bestrafung ... Eine Prüfung! Ich werde die Qualen des ... Fleisches ertragen ... Mein Geist wird einen Weg finden ..."
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sein ganzer Körper erzittert, ehe er plötzlich erstarrt. Schluchzend flüstert er mit einem freudlosen Lächeln:{/n} "Ich höre ... Ihn! Keine Bestrafung ... Eine Prüfung! Ich werde die Qualen des ... Fleisches ertragen ... Mein Geist wird einen Weg finden ..."
